requirements.notes: Controlled 2-15 C sine-wave regime; Manzanillo/Ascolano limited; not a universal species chill-hour rule.

assumptions: Species-level single chill threshold is unsafe given within-source cultivar differences and Central Valley chill-crop non-correlation.
explicitUnknowns: Arbequina-specific modern chill claims (HOLD; not entered).
flowering.conflictReason: Hartmann and Whisler 1975 show cultivar-dependent flowering responses to chilling regimes (Ascolano produced inflorescences under a wider range of temperature patterns than Manzanillo) and report no correlation over seven years between Central Valley winter chilling amount and subsequent crop size. A single species-wide olive chill threshold is therefore unsafe; flowering remains conflicting at species level while cultivar-limited controlled regimes are retained as evidence.
flowering.applicabilityNotes: Conflicting uses conflictReason from verified Hartmann 1975 cultivar findings only; no excluded evidence IDs referenced.

explicitUnknowns: Bloom-weather fruit-set thresholds for this pilot.
